title: First Steps: Intro to Music
description: The absolute basics of how music is written. Learn what a staff is, how notes go up and down, and the fundamental concept of a steady beat.

sessions.title: The Musical Grid
sessions.description: Learn what the 5 lines and 4 spaces mean.
sessions.prompt: Explain me about the elements of a basic sheet, the musical staff, treble clef, time signature and notes, explain superficially, show an exercise with only a middle C, then explain the user how to find the middle C and play it on the exercise.

sessions.title: Pitch Direction & The 5-Finger Position
sessions.description: Understand how notes moving on the staff relate to pitch.
sessions.prompt: Explain the concept of pitch direction: higher on the staff means higher pitch, lower means lower. Introduce the notes F and G to complete the 5-finger C major position. Create simple exercises stepping up from C to G and back down.

sessions.title: The Steady Beat
sessions.description: Feel the underlying pulse of music.
sessions.prompt: Introduce the concept of a steady beat and basic rhythm. Teach the difference in duration between whole notes, half notes, and quarter notes in 4/4 time. Create simple exercises using only the C major 5-finger position that mixes these note values.
